name: 0abb5a0a-fc27-446b-8a27-f1443daf7fe4

agentUtterance.text:
Okay! To add an event to your calendar, I'll need some information.

First, what is the name of your event?
And what type of event is this? Is it for Work, Personal, School, or General?
Okay, and what is the start date and time for your homework?
Okay, and will 'Homework' last all day?
What date and time will 'Homework' end?
Okay, and will this event repeat?
At what interval? (e.g. every day, every other day, every 3 days)
And when should the repeating event stop repeating?
You're all set. I've created your repeating event for you, called 'Homework'.

playbookInput.precedingConversationSummary: Preceding conversation goes over user's mood and current calendar before asking if the user wants to add an event to their calendar.

playbookOutput.executionSummary: Customer wants to add a school event named Homework to the calendar which starts today at 10:15am and ends today at 11:15am, repeating every other day until a month from now.

description: This example covers using the Event Scheduler playbook for adding a repeating event using the Event Add function tool.
